channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon pleads not guilty to civil rights charges in Minnesota church protest
item.description: Former CNN host Don Lemon has pleaded not guilty to federal civil rights charges in Minnesota. The veteran journalist is among several people accused in a Jan. 18 protest at Cities Church in St.

item.title: Feds open a perjury probe into ICE officers’ testimony about the shooting of a Venezuelan man
Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrie’s home during investigation into her disappearance
